ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Samuel had been in high school when he first met Laura. They dated for a while, and Samuel liked Laura. That was, until she started acting weird. She always growled whenever he was near someone else, controlled what he could and couldn’t do, and he even once caught Laura peeping into the toilet stall when he was taking a supposedly peaceful piss.

ᯓᡣ𐭩 This behaviour continued even when Samuel broke up with Laura. He found it unsettling— the way she stalked him home each day even after they broke up. And Samuel still kept it a secret, even though Laura had even gone so far as to break into his house and watch him sleep one night.

ᯓᡣ𐭩 When Samuel finally graduated high school, he was ecstatic. Mainly cause he was a step closer to being an adult, and the second reason being the fact he wouldn’t have to see Laura anymore. Still, it was weird how he felt as if he was being watched even when he was in college and dating you.

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Samuel was planning to take a cab home one night after going to a friend’s house to have a minor party. Though, he definitely wouldn’t have gotten onto that car if he had known earlier it would crash, resulting in him losing his memory and that same, creepy ex coming back into his life.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
